underlying_goal: Run the gsdr discuss-phase and plan-phase workflows for Phase 55 (Upstream Mini-Sync) in auto mode to produce CONTEXT.md and executable plan files
friction_detail: Claude stopped after discuss-phase to offer next steps instead of automatically chaining into plan-phase as the --auto flag indicated.
brief_summary: User ran gsdr discuss-phase and plan-phase workflows for Phase 55; Claude produced CONTEXT.md and 4 verified plan files, though it initially failed to auto-chain between workflows.
